branchPolicy: Create codex/phaseXX-* feature branches before implementation; never commit directly on main.
mainPushPolicy: main direct push is prohibited; push only codex/phaseXX-* branches.
prPolicy: main receives implementation through PR merge only.
mainAheadPolicy: if main is ahead, do not push main; create a feature branch from the current commit and push that branch.
nextRecommendedStep: Start on main, pull origin main, confirm git status, create codex/phaseXX-* feature branch, then commit and push only that feature branch.
